hooks.name: activity-log-inject
hooks.description: v3 migration of the v2 agentSpawn hook. Injects recent activity-log context at session start.

hooks.name: root-file-guard
hooks.description: Blocks writes to repo-root files not on the ADR-0001 allowlist. Reuses the v2 pure-bash fail-CLOSED guard (no python dependency).

hooks.name: framework-dir-guard
hooks.description: Blocks cross-CLI config writes (.claude/, .kimi/, .opencode/, graph dirs). Reuses the v2 pure-bash fail-CLOSED guard.

hooks.name: sensitive-file-guard
hooks.description: Blocks writes to secrets (.env*, keys, credentials). Reuses the v2 pure-bash fail-CLOSED guard.

hooks.name: worktree-confinement-guard
hooks.description: Confines executor writes to their own worktree + shared .ai/ (ADR-0004). Reuses the v2 pure-bash fail-CLOSED guard.

hooks.name: fleet-whitelist-guard
hooks.description: Blocks cross-project fleet handoff writes outside the talks_to whitelist (ADR-0004). Reuses the v2 pure-bash fail-CLOSED guard.

hooks.name: destructive-cmd-guard
hooks.description: Blocks destructive shell (rm -rf, force-push, reset --hard, DROP/TRUNCATE). Reuses the v2 pure-bash fail-CLOSED guard.

hooks.name: activity-log-remind
hooks.description: v3 migration of the v2 stop hook. Reminds to prepend an activity-log entry at session end.
